title: On Our Philip K. Dick Collection (with Response)
author: Gregg Rickman; I. C. R.
card_summary: Exchange between Gregg Rickman and I. C. R. (Istvan Csicsery-Ronay) in Science Fiction Studies (Vol. 20, No. 1, March 1993) about the journal's Philip K. Dick special collection, discussing approaches to Dick scholarship and the state of Dick studies.
page_summary: Letter exchange in Science Fiction Studies (Vol. 20, No. 1, March 1993) between Gregg Rickman and I. C. R. (Istvan Csicsery-Ronay, Jr.) regarding the journal's approach to Philip K. Dick scholarship. Rickman, as Dick's primary interviewer and biographer, responds to the journal's special collection on Dick, discussing methodological questions about how to study Dick's work and the relationship between biographical and literary-critical approaches to his writing.
